headline: Major pizza chain franchisee files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy
summary: Pizza lovers will have a harder time finding their favorite slice, as an economic downturn in the fast-food pizza dining sector has resulted in major chain franchisees closing 100s of restaurant locations and filing for bankruptcy. The nation's largest pizza dining chain, Domino's Pizza, is among ...

headline: Here's What Investors Must Know Ahead of Williams-Sonoma's Q4 Earnings
summary: WSM heads into Q4 earnings with estimates pointing to lower sales and profits as tariff pressures, weak housing turnover and cautious spending weigh on demand.
